attributes.title: All logs for request (correlate)
attributes.description: Java relay, Rust API, HTTP access, and Postgres SQL for one request_id (click correlation.request_id in SQL CRUD).

kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON: {"query":{"query":"(service: (webserver-benchmark-java or webserver-benchmark-rust or webserver-benchmark-python or webserver-benchmark-react-node or webserver-benchmark-postgres or webserver-benchmark-zig)) and (_exists_: request_id or _exists_: application_name or _exists_: controller) and not (service: webserver-benchmark-postgres and message: duration*)","language":"kuery"},"filter":[],"indexRefName":"kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON.index"}
